uniqueTalent.name: Actum Est
uniqueTalent.description: Shooting an enemy grants 1 stack per hit, up to 100 stacks. At 100 stacks the next magazine is filled with shock ammo that electrocutes enemies on hit.

uniqueTalent.name: Eagle's Strike / Tenacity
uniqueTalent.description: Eagle's Strike: Killing 5 enemies without reloading grants an Accuracy and Stability buff. Tenacity: Delays 20-80% of damage taken. All delayed damage is reduced by each enemy killed while the buff is active, up to 100% reduction with 5 kills.

uniqueTalent.name: Unnerve
uniqueTalent.description: Killing an enemy applies a mark to every enemy within 20m of the killed target. Multiple marks can be applied to the same enemy (max 5). Each mark amplifies weapon damage by +15% to marked enemies.

uniqueTalent.name: Capacitance
uniqueTalent.description: Shooting enemies builds stacks up to 40. Each stack grants +1.5% Skill Damage (max +60%). For each Skill core equipped, gain an additional +7.5% Weapon Damage. After 5 seconds without shooting, stacks decay 1 per second.

uniqueTalent.name: Incessant Chatter / Box Magazine
uniqueTalent.description: Incessant Chatter: Every shot that hits an enemy increases rate of fire by 1%, stacking up to 60%. Resets on reload. Box Magazine: Kills with this weapon refill 20% of the magazine and apply a 10s buff. While holstered, reloading within 5s after a kill grants +20% rate of fire for 10s.

uniqueTalent.name: Breathe Free
uniqueTalent.description: Gain 4 stacks per second while moving (8 stacks while sprinting), up to 30 stacks. Each round fired consumes one stack and amplifies weapon damage by 75%. Kills grant +20% movement speed for 10 seconds.

uniqueTalent.name: Rule Them All
uniqueTalent.description: When the agent receives a status effect, 50% of the ammo in the next magazine will apply the same status effect to targets hit.

uniqueTalent.name: Electromagnetic Accelerator / The Nemesis
uniqueTalent.description: Electromagnetic Accelerator: Shots deal 0-100% weapon damage based on how long the trigger is held before releasing. The Nemesis: Marks an enemy as your nemesis for 15 seconds; shots to your nemesis gain +5% damage for each second they are marked, up to +50%.

uniqueTalent.name: Full Stop
uniqueTalent.description: Shooting enemies builds stacks up to 20 (headshots grant 2 stacks). Each stack grants +2% Weapon Damage and +5% Headshot Damage. On reload all stacks clear and you gain 5% of max armor as temporary armor for 10s per stack removed. Headshot kills restore the full magazine (does not count as reload).

uniqueTalent.name: Agonizing Bite
uniqueTalent.description: Randomly marks an enemy within 20m (or closest if none within range). Hitting the marked target consumes the mark, guarantees a critical hit with +20% amplified damage, and triggers 5 seconds of guaranteed critical hits on all subsequent shots. A new enemy is marked after consuming a mark or reloading.

uniqueTalent.name: Onslaught
uniqueTalent.description: Fires both barrels simultaneously. Shots from the right shoulder add Offensive Primers; shots from the left shoulder add Defensive Primers. Shots from one shoulder detonate all primers from the opposite shoulder. Each Offensive Primer detonates for 100% weapon damage. Each Defensive Primer grants 4% Bonus Armor and 10% amplified damage to enemy armor plates for 5s.

uniqueTalent.name: Binary Trigger
uniqueTalent.description: Fires on both trigger pull and release. Hitting the same enemy with both bullets grants 1 stack. At 7 stacks, the next shot deals +500% weapon damage and creates a 7m explosion dealing +500% weapon damage, consuming all stacks.

uniqueTalent.name: Binary Trigger
uniqueTalent.description: Fires on both trigger pull and release. Hitting the same enemy with both bullets grants 1 stack. At 7 stacks, the next shot deals +500% weapon damage and creates a 7m explosion dealing +500% weapon damage, consuming all stacks.

uniqueTalent.name: Ortiz Assault Interface
uniqueTalent.description: While scoped, the weapon highlights a random body section on each visible enemy. Deals +40% Weapon Damage to highlighted body sections.

uniqueTalent.name: Plague of the Outcasts
uniqueTalent.description: Shots apply a debuff inflicting 100% weapon damage over 10 seconds, stacking up to 50 times. When an enemy dies while debuffed, 100% of their stacks transfer to all nearby enemies within 25m.

uniqueTalent.name: Disruptor Rounds
uniqueTalent.description: Shooting enemies marks them, stacking up to 50 times. Deploying a non-shield skill consumes all stacks and applies effects based on stack count: 1-10 stacks: Pulse marked targets for 5s; 11-25 stacks: Pulse and Disrupt marked targets for 5s; 26-49 stacks: Pulse, Disrupt, and Disorient marked targets for 5s; 50 stacks: Pulse, Disrupt, and Disorient all marked targets and all hostiles within 10m of marked targets for 5s (also triggers immediately if any marked target is killed).

uniqueTalent.name: Ardent
uniqueTalent.description: Firing heats up the weapon, filling a heat meter equivalent to 50% of the standard magazine size. When full, bullets ignite enemies on hit. The meter depletes when not shooting and fully resets on reload or weapon swap.

uniqueTalent.name: King's Ransom
uniqueTalent.description: This weapon never needs to be reloaded. For every 100 bullets that hit an enemy, the wielder and allies replenish a portion of their ammo reserves.

uniqueTalent.name: Septic Shock
uniqueTalent.description: Hits apply venom stacks that escalate in severity: 2 stacks applies Poison; 4 stacks applies Disorient; 6 stacks applies Shock; 9 stacks causes the target to take +20% damage from all sources. Duration of effects scales with percentage of pellets that connect.

uniqueTalent.name: Sweet Dreams / Sandman / Evasive
uniqueTalent.description: Sweet Dreams: Landing a melee attack after swapping to this weapon grants +35% bonus armor. Sandman: Targets hit by this weapon cannot use armor kits or receive healing. Evasive: While this weapon is equipped, dodging reloads 1% of the current weapon magazine.

uniqueTalent.name: Lullaby / Evasive
uniqueTalent.description: Lullaby: Landing a melee attack after swapping to this weapon grants +35% bonus armor and applies the Sandman debuff to the target (prevents healing). Evasive: Dodging reloads 1% of the current weapon magazine. Killing an enemy afflicted with Sandman restores a large amount of bonus armor.

uniqueTalent.name: Regicide
uniqueTalent.description: Headshot kills create a 5m explosion dealing 400% weapon damage and apply bleed to all nearby enemies caught in the explosion.

uniqueTalent.name: Liberty or Death
uniqueTalent.description: Hits grant +2% weapon damage per stack, up to 30 stacks. Headshots consume all stacks and repair your shield by 3% per stack consumed.

uniqueTalent.name: Busy Little Bee
uniqueTalent.description: Each shot landing on a different target grants 1 stack, up to 10 stacks. Each stack provides +20% Weapon Damage. Stacks activate when switching weapons and last for 10 seconds. Switching weapons again during those 10 seconds cancels the buff.
